description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in medieval or fantasy-inspired attire, featuring a fitted tunic with shoulder armor, long sleeves, and a belted waist. The tunic extends to mid-thigh and is paired with fitted pants and sturdy, knee-high boots. The figure's arms are outstretched horizontally, and the hands are relaxed with fingers extended. The clothing includes layered elements, such as shoulder guards and forearm bracers, suggesting a protective or adventurer's outfit. The face is clean-shaven with short, neatly styled hair, and the overall build is athletic and proportionate.
description: A male adult in medieval-style layered armor and boots, standing with arms outstretched. The outfit features a tunic, bracers, and shoulder guards.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face, chest armor, belted tunic, and outstretched arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, arm, and layered armor details.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the tunic, shoulder armor, and boots.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the head, arm, and the side seam of the outfit.
attribute_clothing_type: medieval-style tunic with shoulder armor, fitted pants, and bracers
